task_objective: Implement /tmp/srp_review_fixes_implementation_plan.md to fix six outstanding code review findings on the feat/srp-decomposition branch
design_decisions: Cleaned up logging setup in log_buffer.py to clear all existing handlers of type DeckyLogHandler when initializing new service instances, preventing stale logging buffer leaks.
Modified ProcessWatchdog.resume to check _send_signal_tree return value; if SIGCONT fails, it returns a failed status payload and keeps tracking the PID in _paused_pids.
Expanded broad exception policy check in test_exception_boundaries.py to scan all first-party Python files under py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/.
Added '# Intentionally broad' comments before all catch-all except blocks in sdh_ludusavi modules to fulfill exception boundary policies.

Refactored LudusaviGateway constructor to accept explicit keyword-only dependencies (adapter, adapter_factory, log_callback) instead of coupling to the service object and using private attribute introspection.
Validated adapter factory return value in LudusaviGateway.get_adapter before saving to self._adapter or calling diagnostics.
Cleaned trailing whitespace in decompose_srp_service.md plan.
